summary: Inherited the previous systems_architect partial diff without reverting it, completed the ADR-010 authoritative topology schema/read-query/save boundary for M7, and submitted implementation commit d6c84748fd1209b7d96543cbf2a2d6973613574a for independent QA review.

tests_run.result: Before commit, only allowed task paths were changed; after implementation commit, branch was ahead by 1 with clean worktree before handoff creation.
26 test files passed, 197 tests passed, including tests/sim-core-map-topology.test.ts focused topology hash/path/tie-break/negative validation and topology save/load contract coverage.
1 test file passed, 14 tests passed, including sim.list-map-topology and sim.preview-map-topology-path schema coverage.
3 test files passed, 29 tests passed, including topology DTO save/load preservation and incompatible hash/missing topology rejection coverage.
format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed.

decisions.decision: Kept and completed the prior uncommitted topology DTO/hash/validator direction instead of reverting the stalled writer's work.

Added MapTopologyDefinitionV1 as serializable static definitions in sim-core world definitions: district polygon anchors/metadata, route endpoints, route nodes, route edges, mode, capacity, seasonality, availability, terrain/risk/historicity, and stable topologyHash.

Exposed topology read/query surfaces through sim.list-map-topology and sim.preview-map-topology-path; UI/AI receive read models and deterministic reason/tie-break evidence without mutating WorldState.

Topology hash is canonical and independent of input order. Runtime save/load preserves topology and rejects missing or mismatched topology hash for topology-backed runtimes instead of silently loading legacy/no-topology saves.
Did not migrate content-source fixtures or implement client/map rendering; tests use local synthetic COMPOSITE topology data only.

risks.summary: Prototype content still needs a later M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 migration before the product-facing map stops depending on old fixture shape.
Client rendering/hit testing is intentionally not changed here and must be handled by M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001.
Existing M2 transport preview now delegates to topology when definitions.topology exists, while old no-topology worlds keep legacy route behavior. QA should review this compatibility boundary.

requested_action: Independently review M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 against ADR-010, allowed_paths/forbidden_paths, deterministic topology hash/path behavior, protocol/save compatibility, and the focused test evidence.
